dct_title_s: Daniae : regni typum potentissimo invictissimoque D. Christiano, Daniae, Norvegiae, Gottorum vandalorum regi lubens offert
dct_description_sm: Bar scale on map given in "Milliaria Communia Germanica".
Decorative cartouches, pictorial vignettes of cities and figures around border, coat of arms, ports, ships.
Sea names in Dutch, gothic script.
dct_rights_sm: Images from the The Renaissance Exploration Collection courtesy Stanford University Libraries. This item is in the public domain. There are no restrictions on use. If you have questions, please contact the David Rumsey Map Center at rumseymapcenter@stanford.edu.
